summary_en: FY3/26 period-end dividend raised to 21 yen/share (+2 yen from prior guidance of 19 yen), raising annual dividend to 42 yen/share. Hike attributed to results exceeding prior forecasts.
title_en: Notice of Dividend Forecast Revision (Dividend Increase)
translation_en_brief: Japan Elevator Service Holdings announced on 14 May 2026 a revision to its dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending March 2026. The board resolved to increase the period-end dividend from a prior guidance of 19 yen/share to 21 yen/share, a 2-yen hike. This raises the full-year dividend to 42 yen/share (up from prior annual guidance of 38 yen/share). The revision reflects stronger-than-expected operating results for the period. The company noted that its basic dividend policy balances stable shareholder distributions with maintenance of internal reserves for business development and operational strengthening. All figures reflect the 1-for-2 stock split executed on 1 October 2025; prior-period comparisons are shown on a pre-split basis.
